headline: Fiserv Named 2026 Financial Services Product Partner of the Year by Snowflake
summary: NEW YORK, June 02, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Fiserv, Inc. (NASDAQ: FISV), a leading global provider of payments and financial services technology, today announced at Snowflake Summit 26, that it has been named the 2026 Financial Services Product Partner of the Year by Snowflake, the AI Data Cloud company.
